source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Playfair-style editorial headings paired with Inter or Geist for product UI, with Noto Serif JP and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, and body text.
layout: Formal-garden grids with 8px radii, petal-layer cards, thorn-fine dividers, quiet editorial whitespace, and dashboard modules tuned for readable product workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent rose motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a deep garden rose, isolated full bloom with a short natural stem, a few leaf-green leaves, and small thorn-brown thorns; no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: romantic editorial deep garden rose with layered velvet red petals, subtle darker crimson folds, healthy leaf green foliage, thorn brown stem details, accurate botanical form and tactile petal texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any petal, leaf, stem, or thorn.
Lighting/mood: clean editorial studio light that preserves natural red velvet petal color, leaf texture, and thorn detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff cyan chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform #00ffff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff or cyan anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no bouquet, no garden, no decorative background, no second flower, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board, large source board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Rose, derived from the provided deep garden rose motif cutout. Treat any cyan around the reference as transparency only, not as a design color.
Canvas: extra-large wide 16:9 source board intended for 4K display, landscape orientation, spacious grid, fewer larger modules so labels remain readable in gallery previews.
Resolution and legibility: make the output as high-resolution as available, with large readable labels and crisp UI; avoid micro text, dense token tables, or crowded tiny components.
Required visible sections: title "Rose", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, form controls, tabs, badges, alerts, navigation, dashboard charts, data table, command/search, empty/error/loading states, texture swatches, radius, spacing, shadow, CSS tokens, asset examples.
Reference use: Derive palette and interaction language from velvet red layered petals, deep crimson shadows, leaf green foliage, olive veins, thorn brown stem, warm cream and blush neutrals. The result should feel like a romantic editorial system inside a formal garden.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, elegant editorial contrast, tactile petal texture used sparingly, restrained practical SaaS UI.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with multilingual product UI guidance.
Color constraints: use motif-derived colors only: velvet red, deep crimson, leaf green, olive vein, thorn brown, warm cream, soft blush neutral, ink brown. No cyan, no blue/purple gradient, no unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible micro text.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Rose design-system board. It must feel like the same romantic editorial system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the provided deep garden rose motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve the velvet red primary controls, deep crimson shadows, leaf green accents, olive vein secondary tones, thorn brown structure, warm cream text highlights, blush status surfaces, and ink brown depth.
Canvas: extra-large wide 16:9 source board, landscape orientation, spacious grid, fewer larger modules so labels remain readable.
Resolution and legibility: make the output as high-resolution as available, with large readable labels and crisp UI; avoid micro text and crowded token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Rose", label "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, form controls, tabs, badges, alerts, navigation, dashboard charts, data table, command/search, empty/error/loading states, texture swatches, radius, spacing, shadow, CSS tokens, asset examples.
Visual details: dark background derived from rose shadow and ink brown, light text from warm cream, deep red interactive states, leaf green success/accent states, thorn brown borders, subtle rose petal texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with multilingual product UI guidance.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no cyan, no neon colors, no pure flat black, no unrelated saturated colors, no blue/purple gradients, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names.
